meta.title: Daily Mathle puzzle, one arithmetic Wordle challenge each day
meta.description: Play the daily Mathle puzzle. Solve one hidden addition or subtraction in five guesses, with a new browser-local challenge every day.
seo.heading: Daily Mathle
seo.intro: Daily Mathle gives everyone one arithmetic puzzle for the day. Find the hidden addition or subtraction equation in five guesses and come back tomorrow for the next challenge.
seo.feature: The Daily mode is fixed by your browser's local date. Progress is saved in this browser, so you can leave and return before the next daily puzzle appears.
seo.rhythmHeading: Best for a short daily habit
seo.rhythm: Use Daily mode when you want one focused Mathle round: solve it, share the result, and compare the same puzzle with friends.
